Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "RAINBOWCHASER-0400-8000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rainbow Chaser.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 which turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $FE12. However the true start address is $8000.
